rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ERNEST V. RHINE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Contestant Lydia Marquez Rhines Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories From Respondent Kimberly Rhine Gagosian Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Larry Larson Esq
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Joseph M. Quinn: Motion granted as to Form Interrogatory 17.1 for responses to RFA, Set One No. 1, 19-21, 25, 28, 45-49-51-189, and RFA, Set Two, No. 1-5, and 14. Motion denied as to RFA, Set One, No. 35, 36. Motion denied as to Form Interrogatory No. 2.6. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 14, 2019.

Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ERNEST V. RHINE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Contestant Lydia Marquez Rhines Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Resopnses To Requests For Admission Set One From Respondent Kimberly Rhine Gagosian Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Larry Larson Esq
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Joseph M. Quinn: Motion granted as to RFAs 12, 19, 20, 21, 25, 28, 49, 57, 58, 68, 70, 72, 140, 143, 146, 153, 155, 156, 157, 166, and 167. Motion denied as to RFAs 35 and 36, as those allegations were previously struck in the November 14, 2018 Order entered in this case. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 14, 2019.
